improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your AI-powered trade and business assistant. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for operations and trade. Try 3 free searches, then unlock unlimited access from US$2/day."><meta property="og:title" content="Gideon | AI Trade & Business Assistant by GDN AI"><meta property="og:description" content="Your Claude-powered assistant for trade and business. Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access. Start with 3 free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-image.jpg"><meta property="og:url" content="https://gdn.ai/"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly communicating the value proposition and free trial offer. Open Graph tags ensure professional, branded previews when the page is shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, or Facebook—critical for B2B audiences. Including the starting price and free searches reduces friction by setting expectations upfront.

improvements.suggestion:
Meet Gideon — Your AI Trade & Business Assistant

Get instant, expert answers for trade and operations. Try three searches free, then unlock unlimited access.
improvements.rationale: Immediately introduces Gideon by name and purpose, reinforces the Claude-powered credibility through 'expert answers,' and clearly states the free trial offer to reduce friction and drive conversions.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to choose a membership plan. Starting from just US$2 per day, you'll unlock unlimited access to Gideon's full capabilities—including voice chat, your personal members workspace, and professional trade and business support. Annual plans save you 30 percent.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in a freemium model: what happens when the free trial ends. By clearly explaining the transition and reinforcing value (unlimited access, voice chat, workspace) alongside accessible pricing, it reduces uncertainty and supports conversion at the paywall moment.
